title: Cozy Items
description: Cozy Items is a resource pack that turns planks and rocks into 2d textures in your inventory, also improves sticks!
body:
Cozy Items will make some blocks in the game look more cozy, making them 2d sprites in your inventory, also improves sticks! because why not!

Even if it says 1.21 it can probably be used with every version of Minecraft (don't quote me on that).

Heavily inspired by [Fresh wood](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-wood).
I recommend using this along side it! shout out!

Let me know if you want mod support or heck, even make your own! :)

![Showcase in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e701c0cbde94f2e747caf5c593bd26f2ba00671.png)
